Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Medication Therapy Management Enrollment │ May 2024│ V 1.3 14 

CMR_RECIPIENT_INI 

LABEL: Indicates the recipient of the initial comprehensive medication review (CMR) offer 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates the recipient of the initial comprehensive medication review (CMR) offer 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: 01 = Beneficiary 
02 = Beneficiary's prescriber 
03 = Caregiver 
99 = Other
